issues.sample: I discovered what appears to be severe rubbing on one of the fuel lines in my 2024 Toyota GR86. The car has just over 6,000 miles on it, and the rubbing is so severe that it has removed the printed writing on the line and smoothed out the hose to the point where it is flat. From

narrative.headline: What 2024 Toyota Gr86 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 3 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Fuel/Propulsion System (100% of reports).
